title: Man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after boy injured in crocodile enclosure
description: A three-year-old boy was taken to Addenbrooke's Hospital with critical injuries and is in a stable condition, Cambridgeshire Police said.

title: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
description: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".

title: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
description: While the human cost is clear, the Iranian regime has not just survived the war, it has been empowered.

title: Teacher who murdered adopted baby son Preston Davey given whole life prison sentence
description: Preston Davey died after months of sexual and physical abuse at the hands of Jamie Varley.

title: Hegseth renews Nato criticism and says US will review presence in Europe
description: The US defence secretary's move follows a US decision to scale back its commitments to a high readiness force within the alliance.

title: Foreign Office drops 'do not travel' advice for Dubai, but calls situation unpredictable
description: Thousands of Brits were left stranded in the Middle East when the US-Iran war broke out in early 2026.

title: Tuchel's national anthem complaints lead to Fifa moving photographers
description: England head coach Thomas Tuchel has won a battle with Fifa to get photographers moved away from the bench during the national anthems.

title: Moscow residents complain of black rain after largest Ukrainian attack hits oil refinery
description: A refinery and a shopping centre burned after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
